mapper.select: SELECT * FROM albums ORDER BY releaseDate DESC
SELECT * FROM albums WHERE artistId = #{artistId} ORDER BY releaseDate DESC
SELECT * FROM albums WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY releaseDate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO albums (artistId, name, coverUrl, coverNetworkUrl, description, type, releaseDate) VALUES (#{artistId}, #{name}, #{coverUrl}, #{coverNetworkUrl}, #{description}, #{type}, #{releaseDate})
